title: Factory spec → MES solution (UI)
description: Golden MES generator journey verified in Operator.
prompt: From factory spec: two production lines, a loading rack, an OEE dashboard, and a high-downtime alert. Generate the solution and verify in Explorer and Operator.
uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Dashboard → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste factory spec into AI Studio solution generator.
Accept generated lines, rack, and OEE dashboard.
Verify objects in Explorer; open Operator OEE; confirm downtime alert under Alarms.
